---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in SciPen Studio
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what is broken and what you expected to happen.

## Reproduction

1. Open SciPen Studio
2. ...
3. See error

A minimal `.tex` / `.typ` snippet that reproduces the issue is hugely helpful.

## Environment

- SciPen Studio version: <!-- e.g. 0.2.0, see About dialog -->
- OS: <!-- Windows 11 / macOS 14.5 / Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Compiler: <!-- bundled XeTeX WASM / local Tectonic / Tinymist / Overleaf remote -->
- LSP: <!-- TexLab / Tinymist / Marksman version, if relevant -->

## Logs

Attach `main.log` or relevant console output. Strip API keys before pasting.

## Screenshots

Optional but appreciated for UI bugs.
